You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.\n...\nTitle: From Google to game changers: 9 startups founded by ex-Googlers that secured big funding in AI URL Source: https://techfundingnews.com/ex-googlers-take-the-lead-startups-that-raised-funding-to-power-ai-boom/ Published Time: 2024-12-20T08:00:52+00:00 Markdown Content: # From Google to game changers: 9 startups founded by ex-Googlers that secured big funding in AI \u2014 TFN We value your privacy We and our 1714 partners use cookies and other tracking technologies to improve your experience on our website. Additionally, we may utilize precise geolocation data and identification through device scanning", "relevance_score": 0.85}, {"title": "The Google Mafia Map: 1,200+ startups founded by ex-Googlers - CB Insights", "url": "https://www.cbinsights.com/research/google-mafia-map/", "snippet": "[Jina Parallel Content] Title: The Google Mafia Map: 1,200+ startups founded by ex-Googlers \u2014 and the 10 you should know about URL Source: https://www.cbinsights.com/research/google-mafia-map/ Published Time: 2023/12/08 Markdown Content: In 2017, 8 [Google](https://www.cbinsights.com/investor/google) researchers published a paper introducing a [new neural network architecture called the \u201cTransformer\u201d](https://www.cbinsights.com/research/google-transformer-startups-openai/) that could better understand and generate human language. The Transformer paper was a major breakthrough in the field of natural language processing, and it helped to enable more advanced language models, like the ones being developed by [OpenAI](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/openai). Most of the researchers behind this paper have gone on to found companies and raise significant financing, often at large valuations. For example, members of this group have founded genAI unicorns [Cohere](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/cohere-3), [Character.AI](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/characterai), and [Adept](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/adept-3). Other impressive former Google employees \u2014 i.e., members of its alumni network, or \u201cmafia\u201d \u2014 are founding companies in areas ranging from fintech to entertainment tech to workplace automation. Highlights from the Google Mafia include: *   **1,231 companies have been founded by ex-Google employees since 2018****:** These companies have raised a combined $22B in total disclosed equity funding. More than 800 of them have received venture capital backing, recording an average total funding of $26M and a median total funding of $5M. *   **21 Google mafia-founded startups have reached unicorn status in the last 5 years:**Startups that have joined the $1B+ valuation club include Adept and [Inflection AI](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/inflection-ai). *   **58 startups founded by former Google employees have exited since 2018:** Of these startups, 56 have been acquired. *   **Andreessen Horowitz is the Google mafia\u2019s most active VC investor:** The VC has invested in 46 Google alum-founded companies since 2018, including Character.AI and [Mem](https://www.cbinsights.com/company/mem-1). Alumni Ventures and Soma Capital follow close behind, as they have invested in 36 and 35 Google mafia-founded companies, respectively. Using the CB Insights Mosaic algorithm, we evaluated the management team strength of Google alum-founded companies to identify 10 key early-stage players. [![Image 1: The Google Mafia Map: 10 Google alum-founded early-stage startups with impressive management teams](https://research-assets.cbinsights.com/2023/12/05151110/GoogleMafia-Top10-122023-2-987x1024.png)](https://research-assets.cbinsights.com/2023/12/05151110/GoogleMafia-Top10-122023-2.png) _This list consists of VC-backed, early-stage (seed and Series A) companies founded by former Google leaders. All companies on the list have raised funding since 2022.
